sort.headerTitle: Sort: ascending, then descending, then default (database) order

errors.saveExercise: Failed to save exercise to the database.
errors.updateExercise: Failed to update exercise in the database.
errors.removeExercise: Failed to remove exercise from the database.
errors.exerciseInUse: This exercise is still used in one or more training blocks. Remove it from those blocks before deleting.
errors.saveRoutine: Failed to save routine to the database.
errors.updateRoutine: Failed to update routine in the database.
errors.removeRoutine: Failed to remove routine from the database.
errors.saveMapping: Failed to save mapping to the database.
errors.removeMapping: Failed to remove mapping from the database.

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.validationDescription: Please enter a description (spaces alone are not enough).
exercises.duplicateName: An exercise with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
exercises.saveFailed: Save failed. Check the console for details.
exercises.videoHint: MP4, WebM, or MOV — one file
exercises.thumbnailHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF — one image
exercises.thumbnailInvalid: Thumbnail must be one of: PNG, JPG/JPEG, WEBP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, SVG.
exercises.replaceFile: Replace: drop or choose a file.

routines.title: Routines
routines.duplicateName: A routine with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
routines.saveFailed: Could not save the routine. Please try again.
routines.noDaysYet: No days yet. Use Create to add a row.
routines.finishEditingDay: Finish editing the day row in progress first
routines.saveBeforeAddDay: Save or remove the day row being edited before adding another
routines.submitHint: Save each day row or remove draft rows you do not need before {{action}} the routine.
routines.saveAllDaysTitle: Save all day rows before submitting
routines.blocksIncomplete: Each training block must have a name and a series. Complete or remove incomplete blocks for day {{day}}.
routines.exercisesIncomplete: Each exercise in a block must have an exercise and reps. Complete or remove incomplete rows for day {{day}}.

mappings.title: Mappings
mappings.noMappingsCreate: No mappings yet. Use Create to add a row.
mappings.deleteConfirm: Delete this mapping from the database? This cannot be undone.
mappings.createRoutineFirst: Create at least one routine before adding mappings
mappings.saveBeforeAdd: Save or remove the row being edited before adding another
mappings.finishEditing: Finish editing the row in progress first

blocksModal.empty: No blocks yet. Add one below.
blocksModal.noExercisesYet: No exercises yet. Add one below.
blocksModal.saveDisabledTitle: Fill in name, series, and every exercise row (pick or type a matching exercise name + reps), or remove incomplete rows
